title: Better, Fresher 3D books X HMI compat
description: This resource pack is for compatibility between Better fresher 3D books and Hold My Item mod
body:
This resourcepack is for making Better Fresher 3D books compatible with Hold My Item, you need at least Hold My Items 5.0L1 since this pack uses LUA, we don't intend to offer support for older HMI versions.
please head to the discord server for suggestions and other projects
